trigger.customVariables:
{
    level = "number",
    score = "number",
    deplete = "bool",
    is_current_week = "bool",
    is_header = "bool",
    week = "number",
}
trigger.custom:
function(allstates, event)
    
    
    if event == "PLAYER_ENTERING_WORLD" then
        -- C_MythicPlus.RequestCurrentAffixes()
        C_MythicPlus.RequestMapInfo()
        return -- nothing else to do here.. other events will carry on
    end
    
    
    local map_table = C_ChallengeMode.GetMapTable()
    
    -- sort
    if aura_env.config["sort_by_score"] then
        aura_env.sort_dungeons(map_table)
    end
    
    
    for i=1, #map_table do
        local mapID = map_table[i]
        local alts, score = C_MythicPlus.GetSeasonBestAffixScoreInfoForMap(mapID)
        local name, _, _, icon = C_ChallengeMode.GetMapUIInfo(mapID)
        
        
        allstates[i] = {
            show = true,
            changed = true,
            name = name,
            icon = icon,
            level = 0,
            score = score or 0,
            deplete = false,
            tooltip = name .. "\n",
            abbr = aura_env.dungeonNames[mapID] or "",
        }
        
        for _, alt in pairs(alts or {}) do
            local state = allstates[i]
            state.level = alt.level            
        end
    end -- for map
    
    
    return true
end

check.value:
function()
    
    -- Color Logic:
    -- dealing with this in here so we can set them programatically
    local state = aura_env.state
    if not state then return false end
    
    local c = aura_env.colors[state.level or 0]
    if state.deplete then
        c = aura_env.color_deplete
    end
    if not c then return false end
    
    
    local r, g, b = c.r/255, c.g/255, c.b/255
    
    local text1 = aura_env.region.subRegions[3]
    text1:Color(r, g, b)
    
    local text2 = aura_env.region.subRegions[4]
    text2:Color(r, g, b)
    
    return true
end

aura_env.colors = {
    [0]  = {r=157, g=157, b=157}, -- Grey
    [5]  = {r=255, g=255, b=255}, -- Common
    [10] = {r=30, g=255, b=0}, -- Uncommon
    [15] = {r=93, g=156, b=217}, -- Rare (blue, adjusted),
    [20] = {r=185, g=116, b=232}, -- Epic (purple, adjusted)
    [25] = {r=255, g=128, b=0}, -- Leggy
    [28] = {r=226, g=104, b=168}, -- astounding
    [30] = {r=229, g=204, b=128}, -- artifact
    [32] = {r=0, g=204, b=255}, -- heirloom
    [36] = {r=255, g=0, b=0}, -- deadge
    [40] = {r=255, g=255, b=255}, -- deadge2
}

aura_env.color_deplete = {r=195, g=195, b=195}



----------- Blend Colors -----------
do
    local blend = function(cA, cB, t)
        local t1 = 1.0 - t
        return {
            r = (cA.r * t1) + (cB.r * t),
            g = (cA.g * t1) + (cB.g * t),
            b = (cA.b * t1) + (cB.b * t)
        }
    end
    
    -- find last (aka prev.) values
    local last = 0
    for i=0,40 do
        local c = aura_env.colors[i]
        if c then
            last = i
        else
            aura_env.colors[i] = {last = last}
        end
    end
    
    -- find next value
    for i=0,40 do
        local j = 40 - i
        
        local c = aura_env.colors[j] or {}
        if c.r then
            last = j
        else
            c.next = last
        end
    end
    
    -- blend
    for i=0,40 do
        local c = aura_env.colors[i]
        if c.last and c.next then
            local t = (i - c.last) / (c.next - c.last)
            local a = aura_env.colors[c.last]
            local b = aura_env.colors[c.next]
            aura_env.colors[i] = blend(a, b, t)
            -- c.t = t
        end
    end
end
----------- Blend Colors (END) -----------


-- Sort Dungeons using their highest score
-- (suggested edit by Kir)
aura_env.sort_dungeons = function(map_table)
    
    -- 1) fetch score for each dungeon
    local map_scores = {};
    for _, mapID in ipairs(map_table) do
        
        local inTimeInfo, overtimeInfo = C_MythicPlus.GetSeasonBestForMap(mapID);
        local dungeonScore = 0; 
        if(inTimeInfo and overtimeInfo) then 
            local inTimeScoreIsBetter = inTimeInfo.dungeonScore > overtimeInfo.dungeonScore; 
            dungeonScore = inTimeScoreIsBetter and inTimeInfo.dungeonScore or overtimeInfo.dungeonScore; 
        elseif(inTimeInfo or overtimeInfo) then 
            dungeonScore = inTimeInfo and inTimeInfo.dungeonScore or overtimeInfo.dungeonScore;
        end
        map_scores[mapID] = dungeonScore
    end    
    
    -- 2) sort them!
    table.sort(map_table, function(a,b) return map_scores[a] > map_scores[b] end);
    return map_table
    
end

start.custom:
local text1 = aura_env.region.subRegions[3]
local c = aura_env.state.color

if c then
    text1:Color(c.r, c.g, c.b)
end


text1:Color(1, 0.25, 0.75)
